provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female combat medic in her 30s with close-cropped hair and the calm focused expression of someone who works while people are screaming, wearing a cream-ivory medical coat that has been through two hundred autoclave cycles turning from white to warm ivory with faint chemical stains that never came out over a charcoal tactical undersuit with reinforced elbows, a compact trauma pack in a scuffed hard-shell case mag-locked to her right hip, a drug dispenser unit on her left hip, a biometric scanner pendant on a lanyard, nitrile gloves tucked into every pocket, blood-resistant boots with non-slip soles
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
